lastReleaseMessage: v0.10.0: bar-raise drain (D-006 loopback bind, D-007 import/rollback strict backup-fail, error_log + logEvent, daily prune, regex hoist, analytics surface modules, dedup guard, dashboard preservation, drift-fix F1-F8); .finances/ removed from git index (D-001/D-002 enforcement)

barRaise.topFinding: Code and docs are healthy for a third straight canonical audit, but the delivery loop around YaB has stalled. Nothing has committed since e6cac08 (2026-05-29); the working tree holds the F1-F11 doc batch plus nine untracked audit and bar-raise reports, one more than yesterday, and this report makes ten. The two structural HIGHs from 06-01 are both unchanged: the uncommitted pile (maintainability) and the seven uninstalled CLAUDE.md skills that leave the audit-to-fix loop with no executor (skill-suite health). Zero of five open actions closed, so with the prior bar-raise at at-risk and nothing moved since, the verdict regresses to stalled: the daily job is spinning, re-proving alignment and depositing one more report each morning with no path to land it. One doc-only commit plus an executor with a commit step drains the whole backlog; bank statements in git history (MEDIUM) and a stale dashboard audit block (MEDIUM) ride alongside.
